senses.gloss: meist spontaner Ausdruck des Ekels: ‚wie ekelig!‘, ‚das ist/schmeckt/riecht ja widerlich!‘ ‚das ist obszön!‘
senses.gloss_en_full: An exclamation expressing disgust or revulsion, typically uttered spontaneously: 'how disgusting!', 'that is/tastes/smells repulsive!', 'that is obscene!'
